title: NEBNext End Repair Protocol
author: Isabel Gautreau
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.k64czgw

steps.title: Fragmented DNA
steps.instruction: Fragmented DNA: variable NEBNext End Repair Reaction Buffer (10X): 10 μl NEBNext End Repair Enzyme Mix: 5 μl Sterile H 2 0 for a final volume of 100 μl: variable Total volume: 100 μl NEBNext End Repair Enzyme Mix New England Biolabs Catalog #E6051 NEBNext End Repair Reaction Buffer: New England Biolabs Catalog #E6052

steps.title: Incubate in a thermal cycler for 30 minutes at 20°C
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermal cycler for 30 minutes at 20°C.

steps.title: Purify DNA sample on one column
steps.instruction: Purify DNA sample on one column.
